body: Removing `tabindex="0"` from the `<span matTooltip>` makes the tooltip content inaccessible to keyboard-only users because the element is no longer focusable, so `matTooltip` wonтАЩt trigger via focus. Consider restoring keyboard focusability (e.g., `tabindex=0`) or moving the tooltip to an already-focusable element (button/link) so the hash/help text is reachable without a mouse.

`LockSupport.parkNanos(...)` may return spuriously and does not guarantee parking for the full requested duration. Since this helper is used to create delays that must exceed the receipt timeout, spurious early returns can make these timing-based tests flaky. Consider looping until a deadline (based on `System.nanoTime()`) so the total parked time reaches the requested duration, while preserving the interrupt check/handling.
